raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "assertive declaration framing suffering as having a singular spiritual or moral purpose",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "suffering possesses a defined 'use' or telos",
    "that use is exclusively purification",
    "purification requires removal of 'useless and impure' elements",
    "suffering functions like a refining fire capable of achieving this",
    "no other purpose or value of suffering exists or matters"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as a metaphorical, teleological claim; coherence depends on accepting its presupposed framework of purposeful suffering rather than on empirical logic",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the recipient must accept a worldview in which suffering carries redemptive or transformative meaning and find value in reframing pain as purposeful",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "suffering lacks any inherent purifying function, can produce lasting harm without benefit, or alternative non-purifying responses to suffering are more accurate or adaptive"
}
